'''jachodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headhunter|headhunter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headhunter|headhunter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jachodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæchedeth|jæchedeth]] || [[word:jæchedej|jæchedej]] || [[word:jæchedesh|jæchedesh]] || [[word:jæchede|jæchede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jachochodoth|jachochodoth]] || [[word:jachochodoj|jachochodoj]] || [[word:jachochodosh|jachochodosh]] || [[word:jachochodo|jachochodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jachodoth|jachodoth]] || [[word:jachodoj|jachodoj]] || [[word:jachodosh|jachodosh]] || [[word:jachodo|jachodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jachofdoth|jachofdoth]] || [[word:jachofdoj|jachofdoj]] || [[word:jachofdosh|jachofdosh]] || [[word:jachofdof|jachofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jachodotho|jachodotho]] || [[word:jachodojo|jachodojo]] || [[word:jachodosho|jachodosho]] || [[word:jachodoko|jachodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jachodoth|jachodoth]] || [[word:jachodoj|jachodoj]] || [[word:jachodosh|jachodosh]] || [[word:jachodo|jachodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jachodothol|jachodothol]] || [[word:jachodojol|jachodojol]] || [[word:jachodoshol|jachodoshol]] || [[word:jachodokol|jachodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jachodothotho|jachodothotho]] || [[word:jachodojojo|jachodojojo]] || [[word:jachodoshosho|jachodoshosho]] || [[word:jachodoko|jachodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jachodothon|jachodothon]] || [[word:jachodojon|jachodojon]] || [[word:jachodoshon|jachodoshon]] || [[word:jachodokon|jachodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jachodothoro|jachodothoro]] || [[word:jachodojoro|jachodojoro]] || [[word:jachodoshoro|jachodoshoro]] || [[word:jachodokoro|jachodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
